# Midtown Marketplace

> Midtown Marketplace is a 24,000 square foot indoor flea market and antique mall located at 800 Hobson Ave in Hot Springs, Arkansas. The marketplace specializes in antiques, collectibles, WW1 and WW2 military memorabilia, mid-century modern furniture, vintage furniture, and rare coins. Open six days a week with vendor booths welcoming new vendors. Owner-operated and locally focused.

## Visit

- **Address:** 800 Hobson Ave, Hot Springs, AR 71913
- **Phone:** (501) 655-9377
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/p/Midtown-MarketPlace-Hot-Springs-Arkansas-61573039200847/

## Hours

- Sunday: 12:00 PM – 5:00 PM
- Monday: Closed
- Tuesday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Thursday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Friday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 11:30 AM – 6:00 PM

## What we sell

- Antiques
- Collectibles
- WW1 & WW2 Memorabilia
- Mid-Century Modern Furniture
- Vintage Furniture
- Rare Coins

## For vendors

Vendor booths are available. Call (501) 655-9377 to inquire about booth rentals.

## About

Midtown Marketplace is locally owned and operated, serving Hot Springs, Hot Springs National Park, Garland County, and surrounding central Arkansas communities. The 24,000 square foot indoor location offers air-conditioned shopping year-round.
